slides.title: The heart test your panel *may miss*.
slides.sub: ApoB counts the particles that actually clog arteries. It can flag risk a standard cholesterol check overlooks.

slides.title: Particles, not just numbers
slides.body: Every artery-clogging particle carries one ApoB protein. So ApoB *counts the particles* that drive heart disease, one by one.

slides.title: LDL can mislead
slides.body: LDL measures the cholesterol inside particles. Two people with the *same LDL number* can carry very different particle counts.

slides.title: A sharper predictor
slides.body: Research links ApoB to cardiovascular risk *more reliably than LDL* alone, because the particle count is what damages the artery wall.

slides.title: Hidden in plain sight
slides.body: A standard lipid panel often skips ApoB. Normal cholesterol can *still hide risk* that one extra blood marker would reveal.

slides.title: Ask for one marker
slides.body: ApoB is a simple, low-cost add to a routine blood draw. Knowing your number *can guide* smarter heart conversations.

slides.title: Turn your numbers into *daily action*.
slides.body: Vibe Health helps you track the sleep, food, movement and steps that support heart health, all in one daily Health Score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Your cholesterol can look fine and still hide real heart risk. ApoB counts the particles that actually clog arteries. 🩸

One low-cost blood marker can flag danger a standard lipid panel misses, and it predicts cardiovascular risk more reliably than LDL alone. Save this for your next checkup. 🔖

Vibe Health turns the habits behind a healthy heart into one daily score → link in bio.
